markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, review processes, and new performance dashboards.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy:** GrowthX will focus on refreshing underperforming content (ranking 11+) and creating new bottom-of-funnel (BoFu) articles like competitor comparisons to avoid overlap with Netwrix's internal calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [**Process Streamlining:** The content review process will be accelerated by publishing articles before final PMM approval. GrowthX will also integrate Netwrix's custom GPTs ("Susan" for tone, a competitor comparison GPT) into its production pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=2688.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:** GrowthX introduced two new dashboards: a Looker dashboard for tracking organic traffic and conversions, and CheckThot, a platform for measuring AI visibility in LLMs like ChatGPT and Perplexity.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [**Meeting Reschedule:** The weekly sync will move from Friday to earlier in the week to improve responsiveness on action items, accommodating Dirk's Friday unavailability.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Calendar Alignment

  - [**Problem:** Initial content calendar topics overlapped with Netwrix's internal plans.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will focus on two strategic areas to complement Netwrix's efforts:](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [**Content Refresh:** Update existing articles ranking on page 2 (position 11+) to improve performance.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [**New BoFu Content:** Create competitor comparisons and listicles, which are not currently produced internally.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [**Constraint:** GrowthX will exclude attack-related topics, as Netwrix has a separate, internal strategy for this area.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

### Competitor Comparison Content

  - [**Decision:** Netwrix will now create competitor comparison content.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [**Rationale:** John Knightly confirmed this is a strategic imperative. Mariel will clear any remaining legal concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [**Publishing Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [**Location:** Publish on Netwrix's own website.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Builds owned assets, drives traffic, and ensures brand control in LLM citations.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [**Visibility:** Articles can be published but hidden from the main blog index page, making them discoverable by search engines and LLMs without cluttering the user-facing blog.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)

### Content Production & Review Workflow

  - [**Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [**Calibration Article:** Staged in Sanity, ready for Netwrix to publish.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [**Shadow AI Security Risks:** Delivered.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [**Team Sprawl:** Delivering EOD.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [**Non-Human Identities:** Draft complete; delivering early next week after minor expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [**New Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=2688.0)
      - [**Goal:** Accelerate publishing to gather performance data faster.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=2688.0)
      - [**Process:** Publish articles after Mariel's initial review, before final PMM approval.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=2688.0)
      - [**Authoring:** GrowthX will manage author approvals directly with Netwrix's pre-approved author list.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=2741.0)

### Performance Tracking & Reporting

  - [**Looker Dashboard:**](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Track organic search performance of GrowthX content.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Data Sources:** Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and Google Search Console (GSC).](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
      - [**Key Reports:**](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
          - [**Engagement Rate:** GA4 data on engaged sessions (\>10s, scroll, click).](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
          - [**Non-Branded Traffic:** GSC data on traffic from non-branded keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
          - [**Cohort Report:** Performance of GrowthX topic clusters and URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
          - [**LLM Referral Breakdown:** GA4 data on traffic from LLMs (ChatGPT, Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [**CheckThot Platform:**](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1850.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Measure AI visibility by tracking how LLMs cite Netwrix content.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1850.0)
      - [**Methodology:** Uses a shared index of 100k+ evaluation-stage prompts (e.g., "best PAM software") to simulate real-world executive research.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)
      - [**Value:** Proactively shapes Netwrix's narrative in LLMs, preventing competitors from controlling the story.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=2265.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=2404.0)
      - [Clean up the content calendar based on Netwrix's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [Deliver a 6-week priority content plan early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [Send new meeting time options for Tuesday–Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
      - [Invite team members to CheckThot.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=2528.0)
      - [Integrate Netwrix's custom GPT instructions into its production pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=2794.0)
  - [**Netwrix:**](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=2481.0)
      - [Publish the calibration article in Sanity.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [Clear any remaining legal concerns regarding competitor comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
      - [Review the technical SEO audit status on Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=2481.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the Looker dashboard and identify key conversion events to track.](https://fathom.video/share/LfMSjZPmzpff25WS6z18CDz87N6x9T_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
